item.title: Top 10 Affordable Private Jets
item.description: Counting down 10 private jets that can be found for under $500,000, with a look at their features and models.

media:content.media:title: Top 10 Affordable Private Jets
media:content.media:description: Counting down 10 private jets that can be found for under $500,000, with a look at their features and models.

item.title: Abandoned Plane 10-Year Challenge
item.description: After a decade in the dark, an abandoned plane gets its chance. Will it start after 10 years?

media:content.media:title: Abandoned Plane 10-Year Challenge
media:content.media:description: After a decade in the dark, an abandoned plane gets its chance. Will it start after 10 years?

item.title: Mercedes Oil Leak Check
item.description: A rare Mercedes faces a messy challenge. What does Jimmy’s inspection reveal about the oil leak?

item.title: First Flight of the Cheapest 421C
item.description: After years of waiting, the cheapest Cessna 421C finally takes to the skies. What challenges and surprises unfold during its first flight?

media:content.media:description: After years of waiting, the cheapest Cessna 421C finally takes to the skies. What challenges and surprises unfold during its first flight?

item.title: Jimmys World trades a rare Mercedes
item.description: A rare Mercedes changes hands in Jimmy’s World. What surprising trade makes this deal stand out in the collector car scene?

media:content.media:title: Jimmys World trades a rare Mercedes
media:content.media:description: A rare Mercedes changes hands in Jimmy’s World. What surprising trade makes this deal stand out in the collector car scene?

item.title: What could happen to Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet
item.description: After years of sitting idle, Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet raises big questions. Will it be restored, repurposed, or left to history?

media:content.media:title: What could happen to Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet
media:content.media:description: After years of sitting idle, Buzz Aldrin’s Learjet raises big questions. Will it be restored, repurposed, or left to history?
